codeReview.summary: The feature adds the requested Error variants, Document/QueryResult APIs, and dependency wiring, but it misses a required type contract for Document.data.

issues.description: Feature description requires `Document` to store `data` as `serde_json::Map<String, Value>`, but implementation uses `serde_json::Value` (`data: Value`). This weakens the object-only invariant and allows non-object payloads, which breaks the specified struct contract.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission conventions and implementation guidance conflict on timestamp conversion location: AGENTS says conversion should happen in Database/storage, while this feature (and implementation) performs conversion in Document::system_time.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md line 27 says conversion happens in Database/storage, not Document; commit 442c34d implements conversion helpers in cairndb-core/src/document.rs (epoch_ms_to_iso8601/civil_from_days).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-worker skill mandates RED-first execution (`cargo test --package cairndb-core` should fail before implementation), but transcript skeleton does not show this step before code edits.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: rust-worker SKILL.md lines 26-33 require failing tests first; worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 85d8fd99-7516-4568-8ce2-8f35ebd8f56c shows baseline `cargo test --workspace` then file edits, with no pre-implementation failing `cargo test --package cairndb-core` run.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, and shared-state docs. Marked feature as failed due to a blocking type-contract mismatch in Document.data; recorded convention/skill observations for shared-state follow-up.
